# Wavelength energy relationship

## Short Teaching Summary
Wavelength energy relationship: The longer the wavelength of electromagnetic radiation, the less energy it carries, while short, tight waves carry the most energy. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
